headline: Our
Story.
hero.body: From local beginnings to a growing nationwide presence, our journey has always been driven by hard work, consistency, and the people who believed in what we were building.

company.whoBody: K Gold Beauty Essentials Corporation is a Philippine-based beauty and wellness ecommerce company headquartered in Marikina City and Isabela. We serve Filipino consumers nationwide through TikTok Shop, Shopee, Lazada, and our direct sales channels. We are a company built on speed, discipline, and continuous learning. We move fast, adapt quickly, and operate with the mindset of maximizing every opportunity and every peso entrusted to us.
company.purposeBody: To create products people trust and opportunities people can grow with.
company.whyBody: We believe business should create value beyond products. Every sale supports livelihoods, strengthens partnerships, and creates opportunities for individuals, families, and communities.

mission.storyLead: Our story started in Isabela with a simple belief: work hard, stay consistent, keep moving forward.
mission.story: Through years of learning, adapting, and growing, KGOLD expanded from a local operation into a company serving customers and partners across the Philippines. The products may have evolved, but the standard remains the same: deliver value, earn trust, and never stop improving.

vision.title: Our Vision.
vision.body: To transform 1 million Filipino lives by 2030 by empowering our workforce, resellers, and communities through products made with purpose.

missionStatement.title: Our Mission.
missionStatement.body: To create high-quality Filipino-made beauty and wellness products that deliver real results, create sustainable livelihoods for our workforce and resellers, and positively impact every community we serve.

mission.valuesTagline: Five principles that guide how we work, build, and grow together.

values.title: Malasakit First
values.subtitle: How We Treat Each Other
values.description: We treat every kababayan—employees, resellers, and customers—as family. We celebrate each other's successes, support one another through challenges, and believe that when one person wins, we all win.

values.title: We Rise Together
values.subtitle: How We Move as One Team
values.description: Success is never achieved alone. We believe in lifting others as we climb, sharing knowledge, supporting one another, and ensuring that no one is left behind. When one of us succeeds, we help the next succeed. When one struggles, we extend a helping hand.

values.title: Ownership
values.subtitle: How We Work
values.description: We take full responsibility for outcomes, not just assigned tasks. We approach every challenge with accountability and initiative, refusing to pass responsibility to others. At K Gold, we own the mission and act as if the business were our own.

values.title: Excellence with Humility
values.subtitle: How We Build
values.description: We strive to create products, services, and experiences worthy of our name. We pursue excellence in everything we do while remaining grounded, grateful, and open to continuous improvement.

values.title: Grit ng Pinoy
values.subtitle: How We Endure
values.description: Our journey began in a small barrio in Isabela. Through hard work, faith, resilience, and determination, we built what K Gold is today. We embrace challenges, persevere through adversity, and never quit until the mission is accomplished. That is our standard.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.quote: Success is built one decision, one customer, and one day at a time. Consistency will always matter more than shortcuts.
leadership.name: Leanne Domenden Dela Cruz

careers.title: Shape Tomorrow.
careers.description: Join a team that values ownership, continuous learning, and the drive to build something that lasts.
